settings.title: Book a Road-Trip Check Before the Summer Getaway
settings.excerpt: A loaded car heading off in July puts strain on the exact parts a quick check would have caught in June.
settings.body:
Summer is when families pile four people and a fortnight of luggage into a car that has barely left town all year. It is also our busiest season for roadside breakdown calls.

So we are running a flat-rate holiday check through June. We go over tyres including the spare, brakes, coolant, air conditioning, and battery health, and flag anything that would spoil a long drive.

It takes about an hour and we will tell you straight whether the car is fit for the trip or needs a small job first.

Book early in June if you can. The week before the schools break up is always our tightest.
